function f(f)return e[f-(499852+-495539)]end for f,p in ipairs({{-190021-(-190022);481708-480111};{624757+-624756,-346455+347463};{492846+-491837;-839579+841176}})do while p[863485+-863484]<p[96966+-96964]do
